description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and publishes a Docker image. The workflow should trigger on push to the master branch, on release publication, and on workflow dispatch. Use an ubuntu-latest job with read permission to repository contents and write permission to packages. The workflow should check out the repository, set up QEMU and Docker Buildx, log in to the GitHub Container registry, extract metadata for the Docker image, and then build and push the image with multi-platform support.
